doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document is dated March 2026 (future date beyond training cutoff) and its core legal position—that pseudonymized data fall outside GDPR scope for non-key-holders—contradicts established EDPB guidance that such data remain personal data
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document is dated March 2026 (a future date from the training cutoff), uses a plausible but unverifiable EDPB format, and makes substantive legal claims (particularly §2 claiming pseudonymized data falls outside GDPR scope for non-key-holders) that contradict established EDPB positions that pseudonymized data remain personal data under GDPR when re-identification is reasonably feasible.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document is dated March 2026 (future date beyond training cutoff) and its core legal position—that pseudonymized data fall outside GDPR scope for non-key-holders—contradicts established EDPB guidance that such data remain personal data when re-identification is reasonably feasible.
